compiled_state.title: RED: Create tests for emit-review-result.sh wrapper
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-emit-review-result.sh with 7 tests that call emit-review-result.sh (which does not exist yet). Tests should FAIL (RED).

Uses WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR env var override and mktemp -d temp dirs (established pattern from test-write-reviewer-findings.sh).

Test functions:
- test_emit_review_result_all_fields_present: fixture reviewer-findings.json + test-gate-status + all CLI args → valid JSONL with all fields
- test_emit_review_result_missing_test_gate_status: no test-gate-status file → test_gate_status="unknown"
- test_emit_review_result_missing_findings_fails: no reviewer-findings.json → non-zero exit
- test_emit_review_result_pass_scenario: pass fixture, --pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=0 → correct values
- test_emit_review_result_fail_with_resolution: fail fixture, --resolution-code-changes=3 --resolution-defenses=1 --revision-cycles=2 → correct counts
- test_emit_review_result_overlay_triggered: --overlay-security=true --overlay-performance=true → overlay_security_triggered=true, overlay_performance_triggered=true in output
- test_emit_review_result_tier_escalation: --tier-original=light --tier-final=standard → both fields in output with correct values

## TDD Requirement

RED — emit-review-result.sh does not exist yet. All 7 tests should fail.

## Test Approach

Create fixture files in temp dir: reviewer-findings.json with scores/findings array (2 critical, 1 minor), test-gate-status with "passed\ndiff_hash=abc123". Call emit-review-result.sh with CLI args. Parse JSONL output with python3 json.loads and assert field values.

For test 6 (emit failure graceful): create a stub emit-review-event.sh in temp dir that exits 1, PATH-shadow the real one.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-emit-review-result.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-emit-review-result.sh
- [ ] 7+ test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_emit_review_result" tests/scripts/test-emit-review-result.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
